name: fixture/psr4-root-spans-vendor
description: Root PSR-4 mapping (App\) is rooted at the project root, so an -o scan would walk into vendor/. Composer detects this in AutoloadGenerator::dump and adds vendor/ to the exclude regex for that specific scan; without the guard a contrived vendor file (`class App\vendor\acme\sneak\SneakClass` at vendor/acme/sneak/SneakClass.php) would satisfy the namespace+path filter and land in the classmap.
